calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicole Aruda for and with Nanette Sneed. Linda Gatson Sneed (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona. Janice Piper (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona. Serestes Sneed in Propria Persona.

In response to the issues raised by the Probate Examiner and concerns raised by Ms. Piper and Linda Sneed, Ms. Aruda stated that the oil, gas and mineral rights in Texas are being distributed to the six beneficiaries, explained the amount of time/research involved in dealing with this issue, stated that all three insurance policies were turned over to the funeral home and that there was a balance over and above the amounts of the policies. In addition, Ms. Aruda stated that she has had no contact with Julian, that she has spoken with Julian's Mother and advised her to have Julian contact Counsel, that he has been given notice of all of the petitions and that the address she has is his current address. Furthermore, Ms. Aruda stated that the burial plot was included in the inventory, that the understanding is that the Decedent wanted her Son to buried in that plot, that unfortunately the Decedent did not leave anything in writing for her Son to receive the plot so it is passing in six shares, that the proceeds of the sale of the house which took place in April while the Decedent was still alive were held in a joint bank account and that Nanette moved the funds over to an estate account when she received her letters testamentary. The Parties were given the option of continuing the matter for the opportunity to file their objections but instead elected to have the Court take the matter under submission. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Other issues raised by the family members were not addressed as they are not before the Court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Continued To Jun-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicole Aruda for Nanette Sneed (Petitioner). Linda Gatson (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Gatson stated that she will go along with her Sister (Nanette Sneed) being appointed as Executor, but that she would like a stipulation that any and all transactions be reported to the Court and all Heirs be notified. Ms. Gaston also expressed concern regarding the safe deposit box, stocks that were left the Decedent's Husband and prior activities of Ms. Sneed. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The will is admitted to probate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicole Aruda for and with Nanette Sneed. Linda Gatson (Daughter) in Propria Persona. Janice Piper (Daughter) in Propria Persona. Carry Scott (Son) also present.

Ms. Piper stated that she sent a letter to the Court. The Court explained to Ms. Piper that a letter is not an objection, that it is ex parte communication and that it can not be considered. Ms. Piper and Ms. Gatson stated that they want to hire an Attorney. The Court will give Ms. Piper and Ms. Gatson one more opportunity to hire Counsel and file their objections. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to September 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Aug-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Nicole Aruda for Nanette Sneed (Petitioner). Janice Piper (Interested Party). Linda Gatson (Interested Party).

The Court addressed the discrepancy as to the date that the will was signed and the date of witnesses signatures. There being no comment by Ms. Aruda, the Court then granted the petition. Ms. Piper and Ms. Gatson presented their respective concerns with regard to the appointment of Ms. Sneed and objected to her appointment. The Court rescinded it's ruling granting the petition and continued the matter to August 26, 2013 at 10:30 am in Department 204 to see if Ms. Piper or Mr. Gatson wish to file a formal objection. The Court encouraged the parties to talk and noted that Ms. Piper and Ms. Gatson may wish to consult with an attorney. The Court informed Ms. Piper that she could appear by Court Call. The Clerk provided the Court Call information to Ms. Piper.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Barrientos/T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Jul-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
